creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 9 Oct 2010 19:40:11 GMT
Andreas Tobler <andreast@FreeBSD.org> mentioned:

> BTW, is there a plan to update to gforth-0.7.0? Well, I saw that they bumped to GPLv3.

The problem with 0.7 is that it segfaults both on i386 and amd64.
And I'm not sure where the bug is. :-(

Stanislav Sedov
